summary: The diff does not implement REQ-1. No new fire-and-ice tiger PNG icon files were added, the manifest.json still references the old JPEG image, and index.html favicon/apple-touch-icon links still point to the old asset. The project_state.json even marks the feature as 'pending'.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate new PWA app icons (192×192 and 512×512) featuring the fire-and-ice dual tiger design and place them in the appropriate asset path.
missing_requirements.reason: No new PNG icon files (icon-192x192.png or icon-512x512.png) were added to the repository. The diff shows zero added files.

missing_requirements.requirement: frontend/public/manifest.json icon entries must point to the new fire-and-ice tiger icon files.
missing_requirements.reason: manifest.json still references '/assets/quality_restoration_20241226073524096.jpg' for both 192x192 and 512x512 icons instead of the new tiger PNG files.

missing_requirements.requirement: frontend/index.html favicon and apple-touch-icon references must be updated to use the new icon.
missing_requirements.reason: index.html still has all favicon and apple-touch-icon links pointing to '/assets/quality_restoration_20241226073524096.jpg', not to any new tiger icon.
